items.headline: Navy Secretary Ousted Amid Iran War
items.body: Navy Secretary John Phelan departed the Trump administration effective immediately on April 22 amid tension with Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. Navy Undersecretary Hung Cao will serve as acting secretary during ongoing operations in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.headline: CIA Agents Killed in Mexico Drug Operation Car Crash
items.body: Two US embassy officials who died in a car accident in Mexico on Sunday worked for the CIA and had been collaborating on counternarcotics operations. Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum is considering sanctions against Chihuahua state for allowing CIA agents to participate without federal government awareness.

items.headline: Maine Passes First Statewide Data Center Moratorium
items.body: State legislators in Maine passed a first-in-the-country statewide moratorium on data centers larger than 20 megawatts until November 2027. Governor Janet Mills has ten days to decide whether to sign the bill enacted April 14.

items.headline: First High-Level US Diplomatic Visit to Cuba Since 2016
items.body: American diplomats flew to Cuba in early April for the first time since 2016 in a new diplomatic push. Cuba's government confirmed the meeting included assistant secretaries of state and deputy foreign ministers discussing energy embargo elimination.

es.headline: Spain Begins In-Person Immigration Regularization Appointments After 42,000 Online Applications
es.body: Spain started accepting in-person appointments on Monday for immigration regularization affecting hundreds of thousands. The program grants one-year renewable permits after five months residency, diverging sharply from Europe's deportation focus.

uk.headline: UK Parliament Passes Tobacco Ban Creating Smoke-Free Generation
uk.body: The House of Lords approved legislation prohibiting anyone born after January 2009 from ever purchasing tobacco products. The law creates a progressively rising age threshold that prevents entire future generations from legally buying cigarettes.
